metadata.description: Web platform penyewaan bus pariwisata berbasis Tangerang
metadata.author: itscasaa (original: Topan221867)
metadata.notes: FILE INI ADALAH SUMBER KONTEKS UTAMA. Selalu baca file ini PERTAMA sebelum melakukan pekerjaan apapun. JANGAN scan ulang seluruh project. Hanya baca file spesifik yang relevan dengan task.
metadata.scanStatus: FULL SCAN v4.0.0 - Semua state terkini sudah diverifikasi dari file & git remote
changelog: v3.4.0: Tambah bus 7-11 Malika Wisata. Total 11 bus. File baru tambah_bus_7_11.sql. bus_fix.sql diupdate 11 bus.

v3.3.0 (2026-05-22): Update spek fasilitas berbeda per bus. Bus1: 45 kursi big, Smoking Area+Toilet+CoolerBox. Bus2: 33 kursi medium, 1LCD. Bus3: 59 kursi big, 2LCD. Bus4: 59 kursi big, 2LCD+Dispenser. Bus5: 59 kursi big, 2LCD+Dispenser. Bus6: 31 kursi medium, 1LCD. update_fasilitas.sql ditulis ulang v3.3.0.
v4.0.0 (2026-05-23): FULL RE-ANALYSIS + vibechecker fixed & running. Fix baseURL 3000->3003, watchPath ./src->../frontend/src. Dependencies installed. Vibechecker functional.
v3.2.0 (2026-05-22): FIXED - Deskripsi semua bus di DB langsung di-UPDATE via MySQL.
v3.1.0 (2026-05-22): Bus diupdate: 4 Pratama Trans + 2 Malika Wisata.
v3.0.0 (2026-05-22): FULL SCAN semua file selesai.
v2.2.0 (2026-05-21): Fix BusFleet, Navbar, Footer, hapus Partners, update fasilitas 11 item.

architecture.summary: React SPA (frontend) + PHP REST API (backend) + PHP Admin Panel (admin/) + React Admin Panel (admin-panel/) + MySQL DB + VibeChecker monitoring

frontend.styling: Tailwind CSS 3.4.19 + Bootstrap 5.3.8 + PostCSS + CSS Variables

files: watcher.js - Main entry (default watchPath = ../frontend/src, --once mode tersedia)
validator.js - Static analysis + Playwright test runner
errorParser.js - 12 error patterns + component impact detection
ui.js - Banner, spinner, result display dengan chalk/boxen/ora
vibechecker.usage: cd vibechecker && node watcher.js (watch mode) || node watcher.js --once (one-shot check)
vibechecker.note: Run dev server dulu (npm run start di frontend/) baru browser tests bisa jalan

root.admin/: Panel admin PHP - SUDAH TERISI FUNGSIONAL
root.admin-panel/: Panel admin React - TERDETEKSI, BELUM DIANALISIS
root.Topan/: Folder git clone lama - tidak aktif

database_files.tambah_bus_7_11.sql: BARU - INSERT bus 7-11 + bus_images. Jalankan jika bus 1-6 sudah ada di DB.

siteDataSummary.busFleet_fallback: MASIH NAMA LAMA (Zahra Ayu, Wong Kudus, dll) - PERLU UPDATE ke Pratama Trans / Malika Wisata

whatItDoes: 1. Static analysis (console.log, TODO, empty catch, optional chaining)
2. Dependency impact detection (test files yang reference file yang berubah)
3. Playwright browser tests (jika ada .spec.js & dev server running)
vibecheckerDetails.errorPatterns: 12 pattern: null/undefined, typeerror, referenceerror, module not found, syntaxerror, fetch failed, timeout, locator not found, CORS, 401/403, 404

fasilitas_per_bus.bus1: Seat 3-2, Smoking Area, Toilet, AC, 2 Unit LCD TV, Audio Set, Android Entertainment System, Karaoke + Microphone, Cooler Box, Port USB, Kompartemen Bagasi Atas + Bawah, Lampu Baca
fasilitas_per_bus.bus2: Seat 3-2, AC, 1 Unit LCD TV, Audio Set, Android Entertainment System, Karaoke + Microphone, Port USB, Kompartemen Bagasi Atas + Bawah, Lampu Baca
fasilitas_per_bus.bus3: Seat 3-2, AC, 2 Unit LCD TV, Audio Set, Android Entertainment System, Karaoke + Microphone, Port USB, Kompartemen Bagasi Atas + Bawah, Lampu Baca
fasilitas_per_bus.bus4: Seat 3-2, AC, 2 Unit LCD TV, Audio Set, Android Entertainment System, Karaoke + Microphone, Port USB, Kompartemen Bagasi Atas + Bawah, Lampu Baca, Dispenser
fasilitas_per_bus.bus5: Seat 3-2, AC, 2 Unit LCD TV, Audio Set, Android Entertainment System, Karaoke + Microphone, Port USB, Kompartemen Bagasi Atas + Bawah, Lampu Baca, Dispenser
fasilitas_per_bus.bus6: Seat 3-2, AC, 1 Unit LCD TV, Audio Set, Android Entertainment System, Karaoke + Microphone, Port USB, Kompartemen Bagasi Atas + Bawah, Lampu Baca
